summary: Paperwork Page CMS comprehensive testing completed. All 11 tabs verified: Settings (Page Title with {petName}, Subtitle, Theme Color, Hero Image), Ask Mira (Enable/disable, placeholder, suggestions), Categories (6 document categories with subcategories), Checklist (6 essential/recommended items), Reminders (5 templates with timing and channels), Products, Bundles, Services, Personalized, Concierge (6 services with pricing), and Mira Prompts (6 contextual tips/reminders). Backend APIs GET/POST /api/paperwork/page-config working correctly.

backend_tests.GET /api/paperwork/page-config: PASSED - Returns config, documentCategories (6), checklistItems (6), reminderTemplates (5), conciergeServices (6), miraPrompts (6)
backend_tests.POST /api/paperwork/page-config: PASSED - Successfully saves all CMS data and returns success:true
backend_tests.page_config_structure: PASSED - All 10 keys present: config, documentCategories, checklistItems, reminderTemplates, conciergeServices, miraPrompts, selectedProducts, selectedBundles, selectedServices, personalizationConfig
backend_tests.ask_mira_config: PASSED - enabled, placeholder, suggestions all present

frontend_tests.cms_page_loads: PASSED - /admin?tab=paperwork-cms loads Paperwork Page CMS component
frontend_tests.11_tabs_visible: PASSED - Settings, Ask Mira, Categories, Checklist, Reminders, Products, Bundles, Services, Personalized, Concierge, Mira Prompts
frontend_tests.settings_tab: PASSED - Page Settings (title with {petName}), Hero Image, Section Visibility controls
frontend_tests.ask_mira_tab: PASSED - Enable toggle, placeholder config, quick suggestions
frontend_tests.reminders_tab: PASSED - Reminder templates with timing and channels
frontend_tests.mira_prompts_tab: PASSED - Contextual tips, reminders, suggestions, nudges
frontend_tests.save_button: PASSED - Save All Changes button visible

verified_features: Paperwork CMS admin UI loads at /admin?tab=paperwork-cms
CMS Settings tab - Page Title with {petName}, Subtitle, Theme Color, Hero Image upload
CMS Ask Mira tab - Enable/disable toggle, placeholder text, button color, quick suggestions
CMS Categories tab - 6 document categories (Identity, Medical, Travel, Insurance, Care, Legal) with subcategories
CMS Checklist tab - 6 essential and recommended document items (Microchip, Vaccination, Adoption, Insurance, License, Health Cert)
CMS Reminders tab - 5 reminder templates with timing (days) and channels (email, sms, push)
CMS Concierge tab - 6 concierge services with pricing and includes lists
CMS Mira Prompts tab - 6 contextual tips, reminders, suggestions, nudges with triggers
API GET /api/paperwork/page-config returns all CMS data
API POST /api/paperwork/page-config saves all CMS data
seed_data_creation: Pre-seeded via POST /api/paperwork/page-config with 6 categories, 6 checklist items, 5 reminders, 6 concierge services, 6 mira prompts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Paperwork Page CMS fully functional. API endpoints GET/POST /api/paperwork/page-config handle all 10 data sections. CMS has 11 tabs following Learn Page CMS pattern. All default data pre-seeded. PaperworkPage.jsx consumer not yet refactored to be CMS-driven (noted by main agent).
